name: git-forges
title: GitForges
description: Quick search across your GitHub and Forgejo repositories
author: loudog

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: GitHub PAT with repo, read:org, notifications, gist, workflow, project scopes

preferences.name: forgejoUrl
preferences.title: Forgejo Instance URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Forgejo instance (e.g. https://git.example.com)

preferences.name: forgejoToken
preferences.title: Forgejo Token
preferences.description: Forgejo access token (Settings → Applications → Generate New Token)

preferences.name: localScanPaths
preferences.title: Local Repo Scan Paths
preferences.description: Comma-separated paths to scan for local repos

preferences.name: primaryProvider
preferences.title: Primary Provider
preferences.description: When a repo exists on both forges, which one to open by default

commands.name: quick-search
commands.title: Quick Search
commands.subtitle: GitForges
commands.description: Fuzzy search your GitHub and Forgejo repositories
